system.description: Establish a Sanctum Zone centered on a point within 40 meters. Within the 25-meter radius: all enemies take Expose 2; all allies gain Guard equal to your IRON; Silence applies to all enemies for 2 full rounds; and enemies cannot enter or exit the Zone on a turn where they have already played a card — they are held in place by the field's authority. The Sanctum lasts 3 rounds.
